creator: mike@sentex.net
text:
(In reply to Loïc Bartoletti from comment #22)
what does dmesg show for the version of the igc nic ? 
e.g. on mine, I have 
igc0: <Intel(R) Ethernet Controller I226-V> mem 0x80200000-0x802fffff,0x80300000-0x80303fff at device 0.0 on pci2
igc0: EEPROM V2.14-0 eTrack 0x80000290
igc0: Using 1024 TX descriptors and 1024 RX descriptors
igc0: Using 4 RX queues 4 TX queues
igc0: Using MSI-X interrupts with 5 vectors
igc0: Ethernet address: 60:be:b4:16:13:f8
igc0: netmap queues/slots: TX 4/1024, RX 4/1024
